message:
refactor(search): narrow params_from_iter import to tests

After the phase-split sqlite FTS5 refactor, the production code path
no longer calls \`params_from_iter\` — both phases build
\`Vec<ParamValue>\` and hand it to
\`franken_query_map_collect_retry\`, which takes the slice directly.
The only remaining users are the module's existing tests.

Move the \`params_from_iter\` import out of the module-top
\`use frankensqlite::compat::{...}\` line into the \`mod tests\`
block's import list, alongside the existing test-only \`ParamValue\`
alias. Removes one \"unused import\" warning on non-test builds and
keeps production-lane imports aligned with what the production
code actually references.

Pure import hygiene — no code path changes.
